name: 🚀 Browser4 4.1.0-rc.3
body:
# 🚀 Browser4 v4.1.0-rc.3 Release Notes

**Release Date:** 2025-11-24 17:17:01 UTC  
**Java Version:** 21+
**Built by:** @galaxyeye

---

## 📦 Release Highlights

### 📊 Release Statistics
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| 📁 **JAR Size** | 321MB |
| 📝 **Commits** | 18 |
| 👥 **Contributors** | 1 |
| 🏗️ **Build Date** | 2025-11-24 17:17:01 UTC |

### 🔄 Changes Since Last Release
- fix: remove unnecessary check for emptiness in nextSuggestions ([fa5fe9ff6](https://github.com/platonai/Browser4/commit/fa5fe9ff6c3aa29e6988a3d1688fc2e449664d8f))

- feat: enhance task handling and logging in agent execution ([e14a0ed19](https://github.com/platonai/Browser4/commit/e14a0ed193443187905b4606989a37a85d47758f))
- feat: enhance task handling and logging in agent execution ([1f0e015fe](https://github.com/platonai/Browser4/commit/1f0e015fe8a39fc86abb0c074cc4ddb8693332ca))
- feat: initialize tool call specs in executors and enhance help method descriptions ([a279bc0e9](https://github.com/platonai/Browser4/commit/a279bc0e96ea29a88f0a72b5430100ad7e81ec3e))
- fix: update language check for Chinese and improve logging conditions ([72cd1e821](https://github.com/platonai/Browser4/commit/72cd1e82160aadcfff7806076b5ad8e0c9468b3e))
- feat: add summarize method to extract text content and generate summaries ([e3b621943](https://github.com/platonai/Browser4/commit/e3b621943e8fafa90a063c9d94b88bd05cc207bd))
- feat: update return types to use AgentHistory for enhanced state tracking ([e6974fda4](https://github.com/platonai/Browser4/commit/e6974fda4f263bfb413edd0ed7955d820738d240))
- feat: update return types to use AgentHistory for enhanced state tracking ([8dcde1dd6](https://github.com/platonai/Browser4/commit/8dcde1dd6cfb8ed16e72da819c1134387793d789))
- feat: refactor state history management to use AgentHistory for improved clarity and functionality ([79ca5a4be](https://github.com/platonai/Browser4/commit/79ca5a4be52df06a4903ccf5f9ea548604e932b7))

- docs: enhance README with improved navigation, clarity, and quick start instructions ([ebbead859](https://github.com/platonai/Browser4/commit/ebbead85931bc7fb69b71f4ccfe6646525d6a656))
- refactor: update context usage in XSQL and enhance README with quick start instructions ([657213036](https://github.com/platonai/Browser4/commit/657213036e2a67b74fb58763088d36460f455fab))

---

## 🚀 Quick Start

### 📥 Download & Run

#### 🧩 Download


```bash
curl -L -o Browser4.jar https://github.com/platonai/Browser4/releases/download/v4.1.0-rc.3/Browser4.jar
```

#### 🚀 Run

```shell
echo $DEEPSEEK_API_KEY # make sure LLM api key is set. VOLCENGINE_API_KEY/OPENAI_API_KEY also supported.
java -D"DEEPSEEK_API_KEY=${DEEPSEEK_API_KEY}" -jar Browser4.jar
```

> 🔍 **Tip:** Make sure `DEEPSEEK_API_KEY` or other LLM API key is set in your environment, or AI features will not be available.

> 🔍 **Tip:** Windows PowerShell syntax: `$env:DEEPSEEK_API_KEY` (environment variable) vs `$DEEPSEEK_API_KEY` (script variable).
### 🐳 Docker

```shell
# make sure LLM api key is set. VOLCENGINE_API_KEY/OPENAI_API_KEY also supported.
echo $DEEPSEEK_API_KEY
docker run -d -p 8182:8182 -e DEEPSEEK_API_KEY=${DEEPSEEK_API_KEY} galaxyeye88/browser4:4.1.0-rc.3
```

GitHub Container Registry:
```shell
docker pull ghcr.io/platonai/browser4:4.1.0-rc.3
```
